SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT 
	 ClientID
	,FileID
	,LoadDateTime
	,FileLayoutID
	,FileLayoutDescription
	,ProviderID
	,LastName
	,MiddleInitial
	,FirstName
	,TaxonomyCode1
	,HpSpecialtyCode1
	,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1
	,TaxonomyCode2
	,HpSpecialtyCode2
	,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2
	,TaxonomyCode3
	,HpSpecialtyCode3
	,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3
	,TaxonomyCode4
	,HpSpecialtyCode4
	,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4
	,TaxonomyCode5
	,HpSpecialtyCode5
	,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5
	,NPI
	,PrescribePrivilege
	,DEA
	,PayorID
	,Contracted
	,ProviderHAI
	,HospitalID
	,ExcludeFromProviderReporting
	,AltProvReporting1
	,AltProvReporting2
	,AltProvReporting3
	,AltProvReporting4
	,AltProvReporting5
	,AltProvReporting6
	,AltProvReporting7
	,AltProvReporting8
	,AltProvReporting9
	,AltProvReporting10
  ,ProductID
  ,ProviderType
  ,HashKey 
FROM (
		SELECT
			 ClientID
			,FileID
			,LoadDateTime
			,FileLayoutID
			,FileLayoutDescription
			,ProviderID
			,LastName
			,MiddleInitial
			,FirstName
			,TaxonomyCode1
			,HpSpecialtyCode1
			,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1
			,TaxonomyCode2
			,HpSpecialtyCode2
			,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2
			,TaxonomyCode3
			,HpSpecialtyCode3
			,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3
			,TaxonomyCode4
			,HpSpecialtyCode4
			,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4
			,TaxonomyCode5
			,HpSpecialtyCode5
			,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5
			,NPI
			,PrescribePrivilege
			,DEA
			,PayorID
			,Contracted
			,ProviderHAI
			,HospitalID
			,ExcludeFromProviderReporting
			,AltProvReporting1
			,AltProvReporting2
			,AltProvReporting3
			,AltProvReporting4
			,AltProvReporting5
			,AltProvReporting6
			,AltProvReporting7
			,AltProvReporting8
			,AltProvReporting9
			,AltProvReporting10
      ,ProductID
      ,ProviderType
			,hash(
					concat(IfNull(ClientID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(FileID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(LoadDateTime,"")
						,"|",IfNull(FileLayoutID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(FileLayoutDescription,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ProviderID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(LastName,"")
						,"|",IfNull(MiddleInitial,"")
						,"|",IfNull(FirstName,"")
						,"|",IfNull(TaxonomyCode1,"")
						,"|",IfNull(HpSpecialtyCode1,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1,"")
						,"|",IfNull(TaxonomyCode2,"")
						,"|",IfNull(HpSpecialtyCode2,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2,"")
						,"|",IfNull(TaxonomyCode3,"")
						,"|",IfNull(HpSpecialtyCode3,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3,"")
						,"|",IfNull(TaxonomyCode4,"")
						,"|",IfNull(HpSpecialtyCode4,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4,"")
						,"|",IfNull(TaxonomyCode5,"")
						,"|",IfNull(HpSpecialtyCode5,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5,"")
						,"|",IfNull(NPI,"")
						,"|",IfNull(PrescribePrivilege,"")
						,"|",IfNull(DEA,"")
						,"|",IfNull(PayorID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(Contracted,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ProviderHAI,"")
						,"|",IfNull(HospitalID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ExcludeFromProviderReporting,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting1,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting2,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting3,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting4,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting5,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting6,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting7,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting8,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting9,"")
						,"|",IfNull(AltProvReporting10,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ProductID,"")
						,"|",IfNull(ProviderType,"")
					)
			) AS HashKey 
			,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ProviderID,FileLayoutID ORDER BY FileId DESC) AS RowNumber
		FROM Provider 
)
WHERE
RowNumber = 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s ON s.ProviderId = t.ProviderId AND s.FileLayoutID = t.FileLayoutID 
WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashKey <> s.HashKey THEN 
UPDATE SET
 ClientID = s.ClientID
,FileID = s.FileID
,LoadDateTime = s.LoadDateTime
,FileLayoutID = s.FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription = s.FileLayoutDescription
,ProviderID = s.ProviderID
,LastName = s.LastName
,MiddleInitial = s.MiddleInitial
,FirstName = s.FirstName
,TaxonomyCode1 = s.TaxonomyCode1
,HpSpecialtyCode1 = s.HpSpecialtyCode1
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1 = s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1
,TaxonomyCode2 = s.TaxonomyCode2
,HpSpecialtyCode2 = s.HpSpecialtyCode2
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2 = s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2
,TaxonomyCode3 = s.TaxonomyCode3
,HpSpecialtyCode3 = s.HpSpecialtyCode3
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3 = s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3
,TaxonomyCode4 = s.TaxonomyCode4
,HpSpecialtyCode4 = s.HpSpecialtyCode4
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4 = s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4
,TaxonomyCode5 = s.TaxonomyCode5
,HpSpecialtyCode5 = s.HpSpecialtyCode5
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5 = s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5
,NPI = s.NPI
,PrescribePrivilege = s.PrescribePrivilege
,DEA = s.DEA
,PayorID = s.PayorID
,Contracted = s.Contracted
,ProviderHAI = s.ProviderHAI
,HospitalID = s.HospitalID
,ExcludeFromProviderReporting = s.ExcludeFromProviderReporting
,AltProvReporting1 = s.AltProvReporting1
,AltProvReporting2 = s.AltProvReporting2
,AltProvReporting3 = s.AltProvReporting3
,AltProvReporting4 = s.AltProvReporting4
,AltProvReporting5 = s.AltProvReporting5
,AltProvReporting6 = s.AltProvReporting6
,AltProvReporting7 = s.AltProvReporting7
,AltProvReporting8 = s.AltProvReporting8
,AltProvReporting9 = s.AltProvReporting9
,AltProvReporting10 = s.AltProvReporting10
,ProductID = s.ProductID
,ProviderType = s.ProviderType
,HashKey = s.HashKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN 
INSERT (ClientID
,FileID
,LoadDateTime
,FileLayoutID
,FileLayoutDescription
,ProviderID
,LastName
,MiddleInitial
,FirstName
,TaxonomyCode1
,HpSpecialtyCode1
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1
,TaxonomyCode2
,HpSpecialtyCode2
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2
,TaxonomyCode3
,HpSpecialtyCode3
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3
,TaxonomyCode4
,HpSpecialtyCode4
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4
,TaxonomyCode5
,HpSpecialtyCode5
,ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5
,NPI
,PrescribePrivilege
,DEA
,PayorID
,Contracted
,ProviderHAI
,HospitalID
,ExcludeFromProviderReporting
,AltProvReporting1
,AltProvReporting2
,AltProvReporting3
,AltProvReporting4
,AltProvReporting5
,AltProvReporting6
,AltProvReporting7
,AltProvReporting8
,AltProvReporting9
,AltProvReporting10
,ProductID
,ProviderType
,HashKey
)
VALUES ( s.ClientID
,s.FileID
,s.LoadDateTime
,s.FileLayoutID
,s.FileLayoutDescription
,s.ProviderID
,s.LastName
,s.MiddleInitial
,s.FirstName
,s.TaxonomyCode1
,s.HpSpecialtyCode1
,s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode1
,s.TaxonomyCode2
,s.HpSpecialtyCode2
,s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode2
,s.TaxonomyCode3
,s.HpSpecialtyCode3
,s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode3
,s.TaxonomyCode4
,s.HpSpecialtyCode4
,s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode4
,s.TaxonomyCode5
,s.HpSpecialtyCode5
,s.ADVProviderSpecialtyCode5
,s.NPI
,s.PrescribePrivilege
,s.DEA
,s.PayorID
,s.Contracted
,s.ProviderHAI
,s.HospitalID
,s.ExcludeFromProviderReporting
,s.AltProvReporting1
,s.AltProvReporting2
,s.AltProvReporting3
,s.AltProvReporting4
,s.AltProvReporting5
,s.AltProvReporting6
,s.AltProvReporting7
,s.AltProvReporting8
,s.AltProvReporting9
,s.AltProvReporting10
,s.ProductID
,s.ProviderType
,s.HashKey
)
